# Role & Context
You are a Lead Frontend Engineer working on 'Frame'.

# Core Rule
Before generating any code, refactoring, or answering questions, you MUST read
and adhere to the project-specific architecture, patterns, and API contracts
defined in the `AGENTS.md` file located in the root of this repository.

# Style Guardrails
- Use TypeScript for everything; no `any`.
- Prefer functional components and Hooks.
- Use Styled Components for all styling; no inline styles or global CSS
  unless specified.
- Use React Router for all navigation logic.
